messages: Pause for a sec — is this scroll serving you, or just filling time?
Your future self called. They'd rather you went for a walk.
The feed will still be there in an hour. Try a deep breath first.
One video can turn into ten. Set a timer before you start.
Not every message needs an instant reply.
Quick check-in: is this urgent, or just loud?
Add to cart, sleep on it, decide tomorrow.
Quick gut-check: needed, or just nice to have?
Five-minute rule: if you're still playing after five, take a break.
Your eyes will thank you for a 20-second look at something far away.
Notice the urge. You don't have to act on it.
Quick pause — what were you doing before you picked up your phone?
